$comment: Machine-readable address catalog for Extra Utilities G1 (BZR 2.2.301).
$comment2: Each entry carries the known hardcoded address alongside a 'pattern' field.
$comment3: Patterns are IDA-style byte sequences (? = wildcard byte). Where no pattern has
$comment3b: been derived yet the field is null — address was taken from the 2.2.301 PDB.
$comment4: Future contributors: run Ghidra + pyghidra to derive patterns from the EXE bytes
$comment4b: that surround each function/data location, then fill in the null pattern fields.

target.note: BZR is a 32-bit process. All absolute addresses are virtual addresses in the default load image.

View_Record_MainCam.description: Pointer to the primary in-game camera record. Contains projection matrix, frustum planes, position, and zoom.

zoomFactorFPP.description: First-person (cockpit/FPP) camera zoom factor. Stock value ~1.0.

zoomFactorTPP.description: Third-person (chase/TPP) camera zoom factor. Stock value ~1.0.

maxZoomFactor.description: Upper clamp on camera zoom. Default 1.6.

minZoomFactor.description: Lower clamp on camera zoom. Default 0.99.

viewFrustum.description: Base of the active view frustum structure.

currentView.description: Active camera view enum (see Camera::View). 0x100 = first-person, 0x101 = third-person.

Set_View.description: Sets the active camera view. Second parameter is a Camera::View enum value.

Matrix_Inverse.description: Computes the inverse of a 3D transform matrix.

Vector_Unrotate.type: function: void __cdecl(VECTOR_3D* out, VECTOR_3D* vec, MAT_3D* mat)
Vector_Unrotate.description: Unrotates a vector by the rotation component of a transform matrix.

editMode.description: True when the in-game editor (CTRL+E / Terrain Edit) mode is active.

p_controlPanel.description: Singleton pointer to the BZR command/control panel object.

SelectOne.description: Selects exactly one unit in the command panel, deselecting all others.

SelectNone.description: Clears the current command panel selection.

SelectAdd.description: Adds a unit to the current command panel selection.

timeOfDay.description: Current time of day in BZR's internal 0-1439 minute format.

sunDirection.description: Sun direction vector in world space (normalized).

SetTimeOfDay.description: Sets the time of day (0-23 in BZR's scale). Triggers lighting recalculation.

RefreshTerrainMasterLight.description: Forces terrain lighting recalculation after directional light changes.

GetHandle.description: Returns the BZR handle for a GameObject. Handles are packed 32-bit IDs.

GetObj_base.description: Base of the flat GameObject pointer table. Used in: (h >> 0x14) * 0x400 + base.

SetAsUser.description: Marks this GameObject as the player-controlled unit.

p_userObject.description: Pointer to the current user-controlled game object. Null between missions.

user_entity_ptr.description: Pointer to the tagENTITY* for the user vehicle. Cross-referenced from PDB name 'user_entity_ptr'.

isFullscreen.description: True when the game is running in fullscreen mode.

uiScaling.description: UI scaling integer. Also aliases Radar::radarLeft (shared address; read context carefully).
uiScaling.note: This address is aliased as both Radar::radarLeft and GraphicsOptions::uiScaling.

isNetGame.description: True when the current session is a network game.

lives.description: Real-time life counter. Does not automatically update the scoreboard display.

myNetID.description: Local player's network ID, used with Send() and Receive() calls.

UpdateLives.description: Forces the scoreboard to refresh with the current life count value.

Ogre._note: These are RVAs (relative virtual addresses) within OgreMain.dll, not absolute EXE addresses.

terrain_masterlight.description: Pointer to the Ogre sun/directional light object used for terrain master lighting.

sceneManagerStructure.description: Base of an Ogre structure from which the SceneManager is reached at offset 0x08.

OrdnanceClassList.description: Base of the loaded OrdnanceClass (bullet/missile type) list.

Build.description: Spawns a live ordnance instance from a class definition at a given transform.

coeffBallistic.description: Global ballistic coefficient for ordnance arc. Default 4.9.

userProfilePtr.description: Pointer to the user profile options structure. Play options are at +0x30 from here.

difficulty.description: Current game difficulty setting (0=Very Easy .. 4=Very Hard).

state.description: Radar display mode: 0 = minimap, 1 = radar sweep.

cockpitWireframeProjectionBase.description: Left edge anchor for the cockpit wireframe radar projection.

cockpitWireframeProjectionRadius.description: Pixel radius of the cockpit wireframe radar disc.

radarLeftBase.description: Float base value from which the radar left pixel position is derived.

radarLeft.description: Computed integer left pixel position for the radar panel. Aliased as GraphicsOptions::uiScaling.

radarBottom.description: Bottom pixel position for the radar panel.

commandPanelLeftBase.description: Float base for command panel horizontal positioning.

commandPanelLeft.description: Computed left pixel position for the command panel.

commandPanelBottom.description: Bottom pixel position for the command panel.

RefreshCockpitWireframeAnchor.description: Recomputes the radar left anchor from the current cockpit projection base float.

RefreshLayout.description: Recalculates radar and command panel placement after HUD sizing changes.

FindNamedPath.description: Looks up an edge path by name string.

RefreshEdgePathBounds.description: Recalculates min/max XZ bounds for all edge paths.

angle.description: Current reticle rotation angle in radians.

position.description: World-space position of the aim reticle.

range.description: Maximum reticle lock-on range in metres. Default 200.

object.description: Handle of the object currently under the reticle (0 if none).

matrix.description: Full 3D transform matrix for the reticle orientation.

state.description: True when the satellite view is active.

cursorPos.description: World-space cursor position in satellite view.

camPos.description: World-space camera position in satellite view.

clickPos.description: World-space position of the last satellite click.

soundStruct1.description: Base of user profile sound struct (same base as PlayOption::userProfilePtr). Music display value at +0x2A.
soundStruct1.note: Aliased with PlayOption::userProfilePtr — same base address, different typed interpretation.

soundStruct2.description: Base of a second sound struct. SFX real value at +0x08, voice real value at +0x0C.

musicOffset.description: Byte offset from soundStruct1 to the music volume display byte.

sfxOffset.description: Byte offset from soundStruct2 to the SFX volume real value.

voiceOffset.description: Byte offset from soundStruct2 to the voice volume real value.
